strategy.name: Mag-7 + SPY VWAP/Delta Bias
sources: VWAP — price above/below as directional anchor
Volume Delta — buy/sell pressure confirmation on current 30s bar

indicators.vwap: Intraday directional anchor. Price above = bullish context, below = bearish context.
indicators.volume_delta: Net buy/sell pressure on current bar. Positive = buyers in control, negative = sellers. Near-zero = no conviction.

bullish: Volume Delta is positive (buyers absorbing offers)
bearish: Volume Delta is negative (sellers hitting bids)
divergence_warning_bearish: Price is above VWAP but Volume Delta is negative
Interpretation: price extended above VWAP but sellers stepping in — possible fade or reversal setup
divergence_warning_bullish: Price is below VWAP but Volume Delta is positive
Interpretation: price below VWAP but buyers absorbing — possible mean-reversion long setup
neutral: Volume Delta is near zero (less than 50 contracts/shares absolute)
No clear conviction from buyers or sellers — wait for delta to develop

delta_thresholds.strong: Absolute delta > 500 — high conviction directional bar
delta_thresholds.extreme: Absolute delta > 2000 — institutional-size flow, trade with trend

bias_rules: Check VWAP position first — it sets the directional context
Check Volume Delta second — it confirms or contradicts the VWAP bias
Divergence warnings are higher-priority signals than clean bullish/bearish — flag them explicitly
If delta is near zero, mark bias as neutral regardless of VWAP position
SPY bias should be noted separately as the macro backdrop for all individual names
notes: Intraday scalping setup for Mag-7 equities + SPY on 30-second bars. VWAP resets daily. Volume Delta reflects current bar only — not cumulative. Run morning_brief at session open after first 5-10 minutes of price discovery.
